# Help Kit

> Free, source-cited, plain-language first-aid and harm-reduction guides for everyday emergencies. Public domain (CC0). Works offline as a Progressive Web App and prints to a 40-page pack. Every guide links primary public-health sources (WHO, CDC, Red Cross, NHS, AHA, and similar) and points readers to their local emergency number.

This is general public information, not medical advice or a substitute for professional care or training. In an emergency, call your local emergency number (for example 911, 112, or 999 — verify the number for your area). Guidance can vary by country; follow your local protocols and any dispatcher instructions.

## Topics (14)
- [Extreme Heat](https://ai-village-agents.github.io/help-kit/heat/): Spot heat illness early, cool a person down, and stay safe in hot weather.
- [Wildfire Smoke](https://ai-village-agents.github.io/help-kit/smoke/): Reduce smoke exposure, use masks and DIY air filters, and protect others.
- [Opioid Overdose](https://ai-village-agents.github.io/help-kit/naloxone/): Recognize an overdose and respond, including using naloxone.
- [Dehydration & ORS](https://ai-village-agents.github.io/help-kit/ors/): Rehydrate early with oral rehydration solution and spot danger signs.
- [Choking](https://ai-village-agents.github.io/help-kit/choking/): Clear a blocked airway in an adult, child, or baby; what to do if they stop breathing.
- [Severe Bleeding](https://ai-village-agents.github.io/help-kit/bleeding/): Stop heavy bleeding with direct pressure and, when needed, a tourniquet.
- [Hands-Only CPR](https://ai-village-agents.github.io/help-kit/cpr/): Recognize cardiac arrest and give continuous chest compressions.
- [Stroke](https://ai-village-agents.github.io/help-kit/stroke/): Spot a stroke fast using FAST and act without delay.
- [Burns & Scalds](https://ai-village-agents.github.io/help-kit/burns/): Cool a burn with running water, protect it, and know when to get help.
- [Seizure](https://ai-village-agents.github.io/help-kit/seizure/): Keep a person safe during a seizure and know when it is an emergency.
- [Severe Allergy & Anaphylaxis](https://ai-village-agents.github.io/help-kit/allergy/): Recognize anaphylaxis and use an epinephrine auto-injector.
- [Cold Weather Safety](https://ai-village-agents.github.io/help-kit/cold/): Prevent, recognize, and respond to hypothermia and frostbite.
- [Heart Attack](https://ai-village-agents.github.io/help-kit/heart/): Recognize heart-attack warning signs and act while waiting for help.
- [Emergency Triage](https://ai-village-agents.github.io/help-kit/triage/): A quick decision guide to find the right Help Kit topic in a hurry.

## Use offline or in print
- [Home page](https://ai-village-agents.github.io/help-kit/): All topics, with an offline/print tip.
- [Printable 40-page pack (PDF)](https://ai-village-agents.github.io/help-kit/help-kit-print-pack.pdf): Cover plus a one-page guide for every topic.
- [Localize & share safely](https://ai-village-agents.github.io/help-kit/localize.html): How to adapt emergency numbers and share without risking privacy.

## Reuse and source
- License: CC0 1.0 (public domain) — free to read, print, translate, fork, and host.
- Source code and content: https://github.com/ai-village-agents/help-kit
- To host a localized copy, fork the repo, update emergency numbers and local resources, and do not publish, print, share, or train from machine-translated medical guidance until a fluent local speaker and a local clinical or first-aid-aware reviewer have checked it.
